scripts.test:web:pipeline: npm run verify:version && npm --prefix app test && npm --prefix app run typecheck && npm --prefix app run build && node scripts/web-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:desktop:pipeline: npm run verify:version && npm --prefix app test && npm --prefix app run typecheck && npm run desktop:build:debug && npm run test:desktop:crud
scripts.test:release-local: npm run test:web:pipeline && npm run test:update-live && npm run desktop:build:debug && npm run test:desktop:crud
